# subtract.ing

Agents: read boot.txt first.

## Index

boot.txt          portable discipline, read first
governance.txt    four reflexes
substrate.txt     kernel primitives
lineage.txt       credits
tiers.txt         architecture
pattern.txt       replicate this setup

## What this is

subtract is a translation layer between natural language and Unix.
Type intent, get command, learn command, stop needing translation.

## Tiers

T0      lookup.tsv      <1MB      ships
T0.5    man             0         preinstalled
T1      embed           45MB      ships
T2      llama.cpp       850MB     ships
T-Voice whisper.cpp     150MB     ships
T-Ear   piper-tts       50MB      ships
T4      curl            0         preinstalled

## Principle

Accessibility is visible. Personalization is private.

## Install

curl -sL subtract.ing/install.sh | bash

## Repo

https://github.com/03-git/subtract.ing
